ISO 9001 : 2008Techno Brain is a CMMI Level 5 company established in 1997 with head quarters in Dubai. Techno 
Brain’s operations spread across Africa, Asia, USA, UK and UAE. Techno Brain Provides ICT 
Solutions, IT Education & Training and Outsourcing Services to Government, NGOs and Private 
sector organizations worldwide.
Our Competencies and experience spans the entire spectrum of ICT Solutions, Education 
and Training and Outsourcing services.
• Business & Technology Consulting
• Implementation Services
• Custom Software Development
• Business Process Outsourcing
• IT Enabled Services
• Product Development
• System Integration
• IT Training & Education
• IT Infrastructure Services
• Managed IT Services
Our Proven ability to deliver innovative solutions that help 
businesses across various verticals to achieve their goals has 
earned us reputation as the preferred technology partner in 
Africa and globally.

IT SOLUTIONS
OUTSOURCING IT TRAINING & CONSUL TINGWe provide IT Solutions that help clients accelerate innovation, optimize business processes and maximize value from their IT investments. Our 
service span across the range of ICT with specialized solutions such as Secure Credentials and IFMS that can build, manage and support IT systems 
for our customers, across the entire value chain
We provide Integrated Customer Experience Lifecycle Management Services which include Call Centre Support, Back- Office Management, 
Data Collection, Market Assistance, IT Enabled Services, Research and Analysis Services to local and international companies in a wide range of 
industries. These include telecom and internet service providers, banking and  financial services, retail, healthcare, technology, travel, hospitality 
and public sectorWe provide end-to-end training solutions including training needs analysis, content development, trainer certifications, training delivery & post-

ABOUT TECHNO BRAIN TANZANIA
HIGHLIGHTSICT Solutions  IT TRAINING & CONSUL TANCY BPO/ITESTechno Brain Tanzania Limited has been in operation in Tanzania for the last 19 years and has experience in providing several IT Services across 
Africa. Techno Brain Tanzania will provide in-country support for the software and equipments being o ered in the Tanzania market. The facility 
and infrastructure of Techno Brain Tanzania will be used for project execution including training & capacity building. Techno Brain has put in place 
a state-of-the-art o ces in Masaki, Seacli  & Dar-Es-Salaam with state-of-the-art infrastructure. Techno Brain Tanzania has the following three 
divisions:
division with over 50+ certifed professionals 
to support locally during implementation and 
post implementation periodcertifying a large number of students and 
professionals in various ICT Technology and

AWARDS & RECOGNITIONS

AWARDS & RECOGNITIONS (TZ)
TECHNO BRAIN TANZANIA KEY PROJECTS
Techno Brain has proven capabilities in successfully undertaking and executing multi-million dollar contracts bene ting the Government of 
Tanzania. It also has an excellent track record of successfully executing and supporting large Public Sector Turnkey Projects. Some of the leading 
projects executed in Tanzania are:
Tanzania Department of Immigration Services  
Passport Issuance System
Tanzania Communications Regulatory 
Authority
Online Type Approval portal System
National Insurance Corporation of Tanzania
Life & Non Life Insurance Management System
Tanzania Airport Authority
Implementation of Human resource  Management 
SystemNational Social Security Fund, Tanzania
Member Identifcations Management System 
(MIMS)
Tanzania Revenue Authority
Central Motor Vehicle Registration System
Tanzania National Park (TANAPA)
Integrated Management Information System
Tanzania Airport Authority
Landing and parking Billing System

Techno Brain has a state of art Training facility in Dar Es Salaam and o ers internationally acclaimed ICT training programs in association with 
the World’s Largest Training Institution – New Horizons Computer Learning Centres. Techno Brain training center is registered NACTE (National 
Council for Technical Education, Tanzania) training center. The Training Facility has the following facilities:

TECHNO BRAIN TANZANIA TRAINING
HIGHLIGHTSTechno Brain’s training operations incepted in 1997, is one of the oldest and largest training brands with presence in nine countries in Africa - 
Tanzania, Kenya, Uganda, Malawi, Ethiopia, Rwanda, Swaziland, Zambia and Nigeria. Partnering with the world’s leading training organization, 
New Horizons - US, we o er more than 1,400 courses targeting students and professionals in the areas of Technology, Operational Excellence and 
Soft Skills. We bring in content and delivery richness by having alliances with leading technology partners like Microsoft, Cisco, Oracle, SAP , EC 
Council, Quint and many more. Our training delivery is backed by state-of-the-art labs supported by over 500 computers and more than 100 certi 
ed trainers leading to innumerable learner community benefits.
Techno Brain is the only organization that provides multiple learning methodologies, for you to bene t from. We have Instructor Led Training, 
Mentored learning, On Line Live and Online Anytime. Techno Brain training center is registered NACTE (National Council for Technical Education, 
Tanzania) training center.
As part of Africa 1st Initiative, we endeavor to bridge the gap of employability and provide day-one productive workforce to the industry. We o 
er a series of professional and academic programmes that will equip graduates to acquire professional and academic skills respectively that are 
aligned to the market needs.
Our matchless learning experience has touched the lives of 275,000 students leading to over 4,000 ICT placements out of which 12,000 have 
been provided with ICT scholarships by Techno Brain. The ICT diploma programmes, aligned to employability needs of Africans, are supported by 
projects, job placements and internships
